facebook.caption: Not every great coffee shop announces itself loudly, and Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao on 38 Hoàng Văn Thụ is proof of that. Tucked into the local side of Phu Quoc, this small café holds a near-perfect 4.9/5 rating from its guests, which tells you everything you need to know. Come for a slow Vietnamese coffee, soak in the neighborhood atmosphere, and take a break from the beach crowds. Practical tip: it sits in a quieter residential stretch, so grab a seat, order slowly, and enjoy the pace.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the coffee hit the glass, the condensation form, and the whole café slow down around it. Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao is one of those places you stumble into and end up staying far longer than planned. A 4.9-star local gem in Phu Quoc that earns every single one.

instagram.caption: Local vibes, near-perfect ratings, and a really good cup of Vietnamese coffee. Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao sits at 38 Hoàng Văn Thụ and is exactly the kind of place Phu Quoc does not advertise enough. Go find it.
instagram.video_caption: Slow pour. Good coffee. Zero rush. Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao is your sign to step off the tourist trail for one morning in Phu Quoc.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars and barely on the map. Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao is the local Phu Quoc café you need to find. #PhuQuoc #VietnamCoffee #HiddenGem #CafeVibes
